Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Continued To Jun-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Broitman, via Zoom, for Rosa Guevara, Petitioner.

Counsel reports that probate proceedings for the parents' estate has been initiated under case number 305206 and a personal representative appointed. The court advises counsel of its position regarding this matter and of requiring a bond. Counsel requests a brief continuance to discuss the bond matter with his client.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to Jun-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
